title: Cosmos Industry
description: A tech mod that adds various machines to Minecraft.
body:
![Main Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3c5cb14b8f59c5c08e8d902ce244c46294a76fa.png)

# **Cosmos Industry**

### **Notices**

Cosmos Industry is now available for **1.21.1** using **NeoForge**.

### **Description**

Cosmos Industry is a technology-based mod that adds a variety of ores, machines and tools to Minecraft. Build machines to aid in higher yeild ore processing and construct intricate Energy networks to power your machines!

### **Dependencies**

Cosmos Industry requires **Cosmos Library** in order to function, please download the latest version [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmos-library).

## **The Cosmos Series**

This mod is part of **[The Cosmos Series](https://modrinth.com/organization/the-cosmos-series)**.
